name: Naloxone
description: Gasar antagonist mai karɓar mai karɓa na opioid. Da sauri yana juyar da baƙin ciki na numfashi mai haifar da opioid, kwantar da hankali, da analgesia. Farawa IV: Minti 2, IM: 5 min, IN: 8-13 min. Tsawon lokaci ya fi yawancin opioids -- ana iya buƙatar maimaita allurai.
indications: Opioid fiye da kima ko damuwa na numfashi
Juyawar kwantar da hankali na opioid
Wanda ake zargin an yi asarar opioid
dose: 0.4-2 mg IV/IO/IM/IN. Maimaita q2-3 min kamar yadda ake buƙata. Max 10mg. Intranasal (IN): 2mg kowace hanci.
contraindications: Babu cikakkiyar contraindications a cikin saitin overdose
warnings: Tsawon aiki (minti 30-90) ya fi guntu fiye da yawancin opioids -- mara lafiya na iya sake narkoti. Saka idanu na akalla awa 1 bayan kashi na ƙarshe.
Yana haifar da cirewar opioid mai tsanani -- na iya haifar da tashin hankali, tachycardia, edema na huhu a cikin marasa lafiya masu dogaro da opioid.
Zai juyar da analgesia - mai haƙuri na iya zama mai fama da zafi sosai.

pediatric.dose: 0.01 mg/kg IV/IM/IN (max 0.4 mg). Maimaita q2-3 min PRN.
pediatric.note: Neonatal: 0.01 mg/kg don juyawar opioid na uwa.

obstetric.note: Amintacce a cikin ciki. Idan aka ba uwa kusa da haihuwa, kula da jariri don cirewa.
